article_title: Mayor's Task Force on Burnaby Economic Growth and Resilience — May 28, 2026

agenda_briefs.title: Proposed: Burnaby Council to consider final recommendations for economic growth
agenda_briefs.summary: Council is set to vote on the final recommendations from Workshop #9, which focus on boosting economic growth in Burnaby. A draft report will be presented, and council members will validate the recommendations before a final decision is made. This is a proposed plan — it has not been approved yet. Business owners should watch for the council's decision, as it could lead to new rules or programs that affect local businesses.
agenda_briefs.action_required: Watch for the council decision on these recommendations — they could affect your business operations or growth opportunities.
agenda_briefs.source_body:
5. WORKSHOP # 9 - FINAL RECOMMENDATIONS
5.1 Chair's Address
5.2 Presentation of Draft Report
5.3 Validation of Recommendations
5.4 Presentation of Gifts
5.5 Closing Remarks
agenda_briefs.article_title: Mayor's Task Force on Burnaby Economic Growth and Resilience Agenda — May 28, 2026
